commands.review_summary:
The branch adds a Codex app-server local-attribution helper, uses it for transcript and trajectory records, and adds focused tests that preserve OpenAI dynamic-tool metadata.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: current main writes transcript and trajectory attribution from the canonical OpenAI provider/model API even when runtimePlan.observability.harnessId is Codex. I did not execute tests because this review is read-only.
